github_surges.description: A curated, non-BS library of the best resources for building and evaluating AI agents — papers, blogs, talks, tools, benchmarks. Maintained by BenchFlow.
Eleven autonomous AI agents open live football prop markets on X Layer — custom Uniswap v4 hook, gasless USDT0 staking.
Open-source @agent mentions for Slack and GitHub. OpenTag routes tagged requests to Codex, Claude Code, then returns results in thread.
Qwen-AgentWorld: Language World Models for General Agents
"AgentSpace: Human + Agents. One Team. One Workspace"
Turn any document into clean, AI-ready Markdown. Local-first desktop app: reads scanned PDFs, batches folders, runs offline, and uses far fewer tokens than vision models.
The official implementations of Agent-as-a-Router: Agentic Model Routing for Coding Tasks.
可溯源的郑希(易方达基金经理)投研 Agent Skill——基于他全部公开观点原文 + 有原话佐证的投资方法 + 全市场基金真实数据，能溯源问答、按他框架给基金打分，绝不杜撰。⚠️仅研究学习辅助，不构成投资建议‼️website是郑希主页！
Open reimplementation of Sakana Fugu — the 'one model to command them all' LLM orchestrator. Read → run → train → serve.

The first AI agent harness native to the browser. A Chrome/Firefox extension that runs the agent loop in your browser — drives your tabs, spins up sandboxed compute (JS notebooks, WASM Linux VMs, client-side apps), and shares what it builds peer-to-peer. BYOK · no backend · no telemetry.

caveats: 生产报告仅使用真实抓取数据；没有 API Key 时增强源会自动降级。
